# seerr_user_invitations (Data Source)

Get information about all existing Seerr user invitations.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Placeholder ID for the data source.
- `invitations` (Attributes List) List of invitations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--invitations))

<a id="nestedatt--invitations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `invitations`

Read-Only:

- `email` (String) The email address of the invitation.
- `id` (String) The ID of the invitation.
